assessment_objectives.objective: human oversight of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) to prevent or minimize the risks is assigned to one, or more, individuals.
human oversight of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) focuses on preventing, or minimizing, risks associated with an individual's health.
human oversight of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) focuses on preventing, or minimizing, risks associated with an individual's safety.
human oversight of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) focuses on preventing, or minimizing, risks associated with an individual's fundamental rights.
